title: Thai Stew with Uruguayan Beef
description: A twist on the classic Thai red curry, this recipe incorporates rich and flavorful Uruguayan beef. This hearty stew is perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove beef from pot and set aside.
Add curry paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add beef broth, fish sauce, brown sugar, and lime juice.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Return beef to pot and simmer until cooked through, about 10-15 minutes.
Stir in oats and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh basil.
